title: IDOR: Read Another User's Invoice
objective: Access another user's private invoice without authorization (IDOR).
briefing: You're logged in as user 1042. The billing app exposes invoices at http://{ip}/api/invoices/{id} with no check that the requested id belongs to you.
hints: Look at the invoice URL - is there an id you could just change?
Try requesting an id that isn't yours, close to your own.
debrief: The invoice endpoint checked that you were logged in, but never checked that the invoice you asked for actually belonged to you - it trusted the id in the URL. Incrementing it let you read another user's private data. This is Broken Access Control (OWASP A01:2021): authentication was fine, authorization was missing. The fix is an object-level authorization check on every request - the server must verify the logged-in user owns the specific record being requested, not just that they're logged in at all.

logs_append: [ACCESS] invoice {id} viewed by user 1042 - no ownership check performed
